name: digital-bank-and-loan-management-system
description: Workspace runner for backend and frontend

scripts.start: npm run start:infra && concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.stop:infra: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml stop mongo redis
scripts.seed: npm run prepare:backend-env && cd backend && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m app.scripts.seed_data
scripts.start:backend: npm run prepare:backend-env && cd backend && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
